ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (actor:Person {name: 'Tom Hanks'})-[r1:ACTED_IN]->(movie:Movie {title: 'Forrest Gump'}),
    p2 = (actor)-[r2:DIRECTED]->(movie2:Movie {released: 1994}),
    p3 = (movie)-[r3:REVIEWED]->(review:Movie {tagline: 'Life is like a box of chocolates...'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does the 1994 release of a film directed by Tom Hanks compare to his acting roles in it, given his audience reviews reflect on its iconic tagline?

cypher:
MATCH (tom:Person {name: "Tom Hanks"})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie {released: 1994})
WITH m
MATCH (tom)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m)<-[:REVIEWED]-(r:Person)
RETURN m.title AS movie, tom.name AS director, collect(r.rating) AS ratings, m.tagline AS tagline
